roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS - FILED
DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC 1538,5 (TO SET) FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:POSSIBLE DISMISSAL PUR DEJ/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETEDALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THEDEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE GUILTY PLEAIS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA ENTERED,/SATERM/MO PC 1385:INTHE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #3, 32PC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR 6 MONTHS: OBTAIN NO NEW ARREST, ABIDE BY   THE FILED STAY AWAY ORDER: 800 BLOCK OF LARKIN ST (150 YARDS)/X:AT THE END OF THE 6 MONTHS IF DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETEDTHESE TERMS THEN PLEA WILL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE PEOPLE WILL DISMISS CASE/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS, HE WILL RECEIVE:ISS;1 YR CRT PROB;CTS;ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDER;WS;FINES AND FEES/ /X:COURT TERMINATES DEFENDANT'S ORMS REQUIREMENTS TODAY/CONTD: POSSIBLE DISMISSAL PURSUANT DEJ/X:DAW IF IN COMPLIANCE DEJ

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS/INTC/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS, ENVELOPE #1, IS RELEASED TO THE DEFENSE,/X:THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE,/MO GRTD/CAUSE/NTW60/LDPX:12-14-20/CONTD:SUBPOENAEDRECORDS RETURN ON 11-25-20/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 12-03-20/DOP/TE:1HOUR/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:12-01-20,(30TH)/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/LD 12-14-20 (60TH)/X:REQUEST MADE BY BOTHPARTIES TO CONTINUE CASE/CAUSE/CONT/DOP/X:EST 1 HR/
/CAL:SUBPOENAED RECORDS RETURN/INTC/ORNAS/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS (CAD) ISRELEASED TO THE PUBLIC DEFENDER/X:DATE OF 12-03-20 IS CONFIRMED/
